name: ActiveFence
description: ActiveFence — trust & safety platform with AI content moderation, threat intelligence, and red-teaming.

seo.title: ActiveFence — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: ActiveFence: ActiveFence — trust & safety platform with AI content moderation, threat intelligence, and red-teaming.

when_to_use: Moderating UGC at scale with multi-category AI threat detection
Running red-team adversarial testing on trust & safety systems
Integrating threat intelligence feeds into content moderation
Building compliance-ready moderation with explainability reports

pros: Covers text, image, video, and audio in one platform
Threat intelligence beyond standard moderation APIs
Red-teaming service for generative AI safety
Strong coverage of 100+ languages and regional slang
Used by major platforms and AI labs
cons: Enterprise sales cycle, no self-serve signup
Overkill for small apps with basic UGC needs
Limited public documentation until after contract
review.verdict: Top-tier trust & safety suite for platforms that treat moderation as core infrastructure, not a checkbox.
review.best_for: Large platforms, AI companies, and marketplaces needing multimodal safety plus threat intel.
review.not_for: Indie devs or startups wanting a credit-card API with low monthly spend.

lock_in.reason: Proprietary moderation models; switching requires retraining workflows

developer_experience.reason: REST APIs, decent docs, moderation-specific tooling
